title: Senior Client Advisor
description:
We Never Stop Dreaming. We Craft New Realities.

Louis Vuitton. An icon. A legacy. A world of unparalleled craftsmanship and innovation. As a Senior Client Advisor, you'll be a leader in shaping unforgettable client journeys and driving exceptional performance. This is your opportunity to elevate the Louis Vuitton experience for both our clients and our team.

Join our passionate retail team and become a business driver, and a key contributor to the success of our store. You will be a master storyteller, sharing the magic of Louis Vuitton while leading by example and fostering a high-performing team.

You'll:

  • Elevate the client experience, exceeding expectations and building lasting relationships.
  • Become a brand ambassador, inspiring passion for Louis Vuitton within the team and with clients.
  • Drive sales and profitability through strategic clienteling and operational excellence.

You will play a key part in shaping the client journey, driving commercial performance and mentoring the team. Beyond sales, you’ll build lasting client relationships, contribute to store strategy and bring operational excellence to every interaction.

postedCompany.description:
LOUIS VUITTON (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

Make Your Career A Beautiful Journey

Since 1854, Louis Vuitton has brought unique designs to the world, combining innovation with style, always aiming for the finest quality. Today, the Maison remains faithful to the spirit of its founder, Louis Vuitton, who invented a genuine “Art of Travel” through luggage, bags and accessories which were as creative as they were elegant and practical. Since then, audacity has shaped the story of Louis Vuitton. Faithful to its heritage, Louis Vuitton has opened its doors to architects, artists and designers across the years, all the while developing disciplines such as ready-to-wear, shoes, accessories, watches, jewelry and stationery. These carefully created products are testament to Louis Vuitton’s commitment to fine craftsmanship. For more information: www.louisvuitton.com
